tool_name: DCOIR Airtable WBS09 Apply Sort Direction
trigger_conditions: Use only after WBS09 view discovery proves an existing sort direction dropdown has the intended target option visible for exactly one view.
input_contract: Requires DCOIR_REPO_ROOT and DCOIR_DOWNLOADS_DIR, Node.js, Playwright prerequisites, logged-in Chrome profile or CDP session, WBS09 manifest, one TargetKey, and exact ConfirmToken APPLY_WBS09_SORT_DIRECTION.
output_contract: Writes dcoir_wbs09_apply_sort_direction_* folder under DCOIR_DOWNLOADS_DIR with logs, screenshots, before/after readback, pre-execute discovery, and rollup JSON. Package with New-DcoirChatGPTFriendlyZip.ps1.
safety_preconditions: Draft, one-view only, changes existing sort direction only. Does not create views, add/remove sort rows, edit filters, or run broad rollout. Must be followed by independent panel readback verification.
launcher_command:
$repo = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable('DCOIR_REPO_ROOT','Machine')
$script = Join-Path $repo 'operator_tools\github_desktop_lane\scripts\Invoke-DcoirAirtableWbs09ApplySortDirection.ps1'
& $script -TargetKey 'Governance Control Plane::WBS09 - Startup Authority' -ConfirmToken APPLY_WBS09_SORT_DIRECTION -EnableScreenshots -UseChromeChannel -UserDataDir "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\DCOIR\chrome-profile"
notes: Active guarded single-mutation helper. First live guarded run succeeded on 2026-05-10 for Governance Control Plane / WBS09 - Startup Authority and independent panel readback verified all four representative views after refresh/reselect. Not a general repair/configure tool.
